sql_array: CREATE TABLE employees (department String, employee_name String, salary UInt32, hire_date Date) ENGINE = Memory;

INSERT INTO employees FORMAT Values ('Engineering', 'Alice Brown', 120000, '2021-01-15'), ('Marketing', 'Bob Smith', 90000, '2020-02-20'), ('Engineering', 'Charlie Davis', 130000, '2019-03-25'), ('HR', 'Eve White', 85000, '2022-04-30');
SELECT employee_name, salary, nth_value(salary, 2) OVER (PARTITION BY department ORDER BY salary DESC) AS second_highest_salary FROM employees;
UPDATE employees SET salary = salary * 1.1 WHERE department = 'HR';
SELECT department, nth_value(employee_name, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY department ORDER BY hire_date) AS first_hired_employee FROM employees;
